headline: The Cigna Group Foundation Invests $3 Million to Strengthen Youth Mental Health Through Nonprofits Across 10 States
summary: The Cigna Group Foundation, the philanthropic arm of The Cigna Group (NYSE: CI), today announced $3 million in grants to 22 nonprofits working to improve youth mental health and strengthen support systems across 10 states. Youth mental health needs continue to outpace access to care in many communities, particularly for young people and families navigating limited resources.

thumbnail.caption: Campers participate in activities at Camp Erin Philadelphia, a grief program for youth who have experienced the death of a significant person in their lives. Camp Erin is hosted by Eluna, a grantee of The Cigna Group Foundation.
